'''R4-M17''' was a hardworking, but stubborn [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. Her [[Arc welder/Legends|Arc welder]] had an intermittent short, and her third leg could no longer retract, but otherwise she was a skilled worker.<ref name="GG7" /> The unit was owned by a [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]], who bought it from the [[Jawa Traders]] shop in the center of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].
